goal: Be independently comfortable for weekend errands and commuting; practical skills prioritized.
constraints: Must practice with a manual-transmission car for lessons.
No more than 4 hours per week of practice.
decisions: Offer a country/state-specific mnemonic sheet for right-of-way rules; tailor content when location is provided.
Consider having a calm friend ride along to provide gentle feedback during practice sessions.
Provide a printable 1-page checklist and a short script for the calm friend to follow during practice sessions.
Turn the night driving pre-drive checklist into a printable one-line checklist.
Delay motorway/highway driving until basic vehicle control and observation habits are reliable; implement short, supervised motorway sessions.
Introduce an instructor-patient clarity evaluation checklist for first driving lesson.
entities: calm friend riding along to provide feedback
short script for friend to follow during practice
Cone or chair spacing drill (on foot)
Visual alignment on a wall or curb (static reference) drill
Aggressive-driver handling guidance (defensive driving for learner drivers)
Night driving safety guidelines (lighting, speed, scanning, glare reduction, fatigue management, weather adaptation, intersections, pedestrians)
Instructor behavior indicators: patient and explains things clearly versus takes over
open: Driving test booked: June 12, 2026 at 9:00 AM
